hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ] || [ "$f" = 'null' ]; then echo 'Hook error: could not resolve file path from tool response' >&2; exit 1; fi; [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Hook: file not found, skipping: $f" >&2; exit 0; }; case "$f" in *.yml|*.yaml|*.md) prettier --write "$f" --log-level error 2>&1 || exit 1 ;; esac; case "$f" in *.md) markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$f" 2>&1 || exit 1 ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ] || [ "$f" = 'null' ]; then exit 0; fi; case "${f##*/}" in .env|.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: .env files may contain secrets — edit manually' >&2; exit 2 ;; settings.local.json) echo 'BLOCK: settings.local.json contains local permissions — edit manually' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0; }
